note:
Happy Wednesday. Let's get into it — because the squeeze data this morning is hard to ignore.

Across the 356 names we track, the squeeze is building in pockets — not everywhere, but in the right places. **140 are HOT (squeeze score ≥90) and 121 are WARM (75–90) — that's 73% of the universe building compression right now.** The market is telling us something. Are we listening? When this many setups are coiling at the same time, the question isn't whether something moves — it's which ones you're positioned in when they do.

Here's what's standing out on the HOT list this morning.

Look at $**KRE**. Daily squeeze 98.3, weekly 93.1. RSI at 56.6 and the regime is Bullish (18d ago). That's leadership. That's what you want to see.

$**JPM** is printing a daily squeeze score of 98.3 with the weekly at 93.8. RSI sitting at 53.3, regime is Bullish (151d ago). The compression here is real — this is the kind of coil that precedes a move.

$**BAC** — daily squeeze at 97.8, weekly at 91.1, RSI 57.0. Regime is bullish (14d ago). It doesn't get cleaner than this.

Now let's talk portfolio — specifically, who still has gas in the tank for members who haven't pulled the trigger yet.

Members who passed on $**NVDA** — the squeeze score is 82.5 and regime is still Bullish. The original thesis is intact. $5.35 entry, and the setup is tighter now than when we flagged it.

$**RIOT** is still in play. Squeeze at 94.7, RSI 66.1, Bullish regime. Entry was $0.84 — the compression is still building. Not too late.

Members who passed on $**RIOT** — the squeeze score is 94.7 and regime is still Bullish. The original thesis is intact. $0.61 entry, and the setup is tighter now than when we flagged it.

Here's your cheat code for today — the names where we've already banked half at 2x and the squeeze is still screaming HOT. Those are your double-down candidates.

$**CIFR** — already sold 50% at 2x, squeeze score is 93.4, regime Bullish. The remaining position has room. This is the kind of setup where you add, not reduce.

$**CIFR** — already sold 50% at 2x, squeeze score is 93.4, regime Bullish. The remaining position has room. This is the kind of setup where you add, not reduce.

The setups are there. The compression is real. Now we let price do the talking. Watch the breakouts — and more importantly, watch what holds.
